reference: Hi, well my question is, I think that I have a cavity and I am super nervous that I do not want to go to a dentist to get it fixed because I know the pain. So either way, I have to go to get it fixed. My question is, how do you repair a cavity, and is there any way my dentist can give me something that can completely prevent me from feeling the pain?
text: Hi. Well, my question is, I think that I have a cavity, and I am super nervous that I do not want to go to a dentist to get it fixed because I know the pain. So either way, I have to go to get it fixed. My question is, how do you repair a cavity, and is there any way my dentist can give me something that can completely prevent me from feeling the pain?
